indicators.name: Large open space
indicators.rationale: The large open space may lead to distractions and lack of privacy.

indicators.name: Concrete columns
indicators.rationale: The columns do not obstruct the view but do not provide additional functionality.

indicators.name: Fountain
indicators.rationale: The fountain may create noise and a distraction, affecting concentration.

indicators.name: Potted plants
indicators.rationale: The potted plants add some greenery but do not contribute significantly to the workspace.

reasoning_summary: The space is large and open, which might be distracting for solo computer work. The presence of a fountain and potted plants adds some distractions, while the columns do not obstruct the view.
